nodes.name: Webhook Trigger
nodes.notes: Listens for POST requests. Send content here from Slack, GitHub webhooks, manual scripts, or any source.

nodes.name: Filter Messages
nodes.notes: Drops messages under 10 chars and slash commands to avoid classifying noise.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role": "user", "content": "Analyze this message and extract metadata:

Message: {{$json.message_text}}
Source: {{$json.source}}
Timestamp: {{$json.timestamp}}

Extract and return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation):
{
  "tags": ["tag1", "tag2", "tag3"],
  "entities": ["entity1", "entity2"],
  "summary": "1-2 sentence summary",
  "narrative_role": "setup|origin|exploration|conflict|realisation|integration",
  "date_estimated": "YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY",
  "timeline_group": "1974-1990|2019-2023|2024-2026"
}

Rules:
- Tags: 3-5 keywords
- Entities: People, companies, concepts
- Summary: Concise, factual
- Narrative_role: Best fit from list
- Date_estimated: Infer from context or use timestamp
- Timeline_group: Map to period"}]

nodes.name: Claude API Classification
nodes.notes: Uses claude-sonnet-4-20250514. Requires Anthropic API credentials set in n8n Settings > Credentials. Replace with any other LLM if preferred.

nodes.name: Supabase Insert
nodes.notes: Update credentials with your Supabase project URL and service role key.

nodes.name: Trigger WF-02
nodes.notes: Replace URL with your n8n instance URL. Remove this node if you don't use WF-02.
